sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100407" key="sune/rrwga" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνέρρωγα</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συρρήγνυμι</foreign> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>):—<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνέρρωσε</foreign>, in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:52" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52</biblScope></bibl>, is <sense id="n100407.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συνέρρωγε</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
